family_summary: This repair bundle drops the pretense of a whole-Yemen denominator and instead keeps a small set of urban/city-centered episodes with at least some direct-death traction. Aden 2015 is the strongest row; Marib 2021-2022 is retained as a weaker but still bounded follow-on row. Hodeidah and Taiz remain open problems rather than weak pseudo-anchors.
notes: Top-level conflict is ongoing as of 2026-03-10. Direct violent deaths only in the baseline path; famine, disease, siege deprivation, and healthcare-collapse mortality are excluded unless explicitly separable.
